uiBuilder.label: D3 Heatmap
uiBuilder.description: A configurable matrix heatmap rendered with D3.js. A grid of cells indexed by an X category (columns) and a Y category (rows), each colored by a value via a sequential/diverging/quantized color scale. Color legend, optional auto-contrast cell value labels, sorting, square cells. Restyle it entirely from the property panel and hook into click/hover events.

properties.name: data
properties.label: Data · Cells
properties.description: Flat array of cells, each: { x, y, value }. 'x' = column category, 'y' = row category, 'value' = the numeric value that drives the cell color. Missing (x,y) combinations render as blank cells. You may also pass an explicit-order object { xCategories: [...], yCategories: [...], cells: [...] } to fix column/row ordering. Bind to a data resource or leave empty to show built-in sample data.

properties.name: chartTitle
properties.label: Header & border · Title
properties.description: Title rendered above the chart. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: titleFontSize
properties.label: Header & border · Title font size
properties.description: Font size of the chart title, in pixels.

properties.name: titleColor
properties.label: Header & border · Title color
properties.description: Text color of the chart title.

properties.name: componentWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Width
properties.description: Outer width of the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "50%", "640px". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: componentPadding
properties.label: Header & border · Padding
properties.description: Padding around the whole widget. CSS length, e.g. "12px", "1rem". A bare number is treated as pixels.

properties.name: backgroundColor
properties.label: Header & border · Background color
properties.description: Chart background. CSS color or "transparent".

properties.name: borderColor
properties.label: Header & border · Border color
properties.description: Border color of the widget. Leave blank for no border.

properties.name: borderWidth
properties.label: Header & border · Border width
properties.description: Border thickness in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: borderRadius
properties.label: Header & border · Border radius
properties.description: Rounded corners of the widget, in pixels.

properties.name: chartHeight
properties.label: Display · Chart height (px)
properties.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Ignored when Cell aspect is Square (the grid then sizes from square cells).

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.label: Display · Base font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for chart text that doesn't have its own family set. Blank = inherit from the page.

properties.name: dropShadow
properties.label: Display · Drop shadow
properties.description: Apply a soft drop shadow to the cells.

properties.name: shadowColor
properties.label: Display · Shadow color (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Color of the cell drop shadow (supports rgba).

properties.name: shadowBlur
properties.label: Display · Shadow blur (when drop shadow on)
properties.description: Blur radius of the drop shadow, in pixels.

properties.name: hoverHighlight
properties.label: Display · Hover highlight
properties.description: Emphasize a cell on mouse-over (outline the hovered cell).

properties.name: animate
properties.label: Display · Animate
properties.description: Animate cells fading/growing in on first render and on data change.

properties.name: animationDuration
properties.label: Display · Animation duration (ms)
properties.description: Duration of the fade/grow-in animation in milliseconds.

properties.name: animationEasing
properties.label: Display · Animation easing
properties.description: Easing curve for the fade/grow-in animation.

properties.name: animationStagger
properties.label: Display · Animation stagger (ms)
properties.description: Delay between cells for a cascade fade-in, applied across the grid diagonally (0 = all cells animate together).

properties.name: cellPadding
properties.label: Cells · Cell gap (px)
properties.description: Gap between adjacent cells in pixels (0 = touching cells).

properties.name: cellCornerRadius
properties.label: Cells · Corner radius (px)
properties.description: Rounded corners of each cell, in pixels. 0 = square corners.

properties.name: cellStroke
properties.label: Cells · Border color
properties.description: Stroke color around each cell. Blank = no cell border.

properties.name: cellStrokeWidth
properties.label: Cells · Border width (px)
properties.description: Stroke width around each cell, in pixels. 0 = no border.

properties.name: cellAspect
properties.label: Cells · Aspect
properties.description: Fit = cells stretch to fill the available width/height. Square = cells are forced square (the chart height is derived from the square cell size, ignoring Chart height).

properties.name: nullCellColor
properties.label: Cells · Missing-cell color
properties.description: Fill color for (x,y) combinations with no data (blank cells). Use "transparent" to leave a gap.

properties.name: colorScaleType
properties.label: Colors · Scale type
properties.description: Sequential = a continuous low->high ramp. Diverging = a two-sided ramp around a midpoint (e.g. for above/below a target). Quantize = discrete color buckets.

properties.name: colorScheme
properties.label: Colors · Color scheme
properties.description: The D3 color interpolator that maps value -> color. Sequential schemes (Blues, Greens, Oranges, Reds, Purples, Viridis, Inferno, Magma, Cividis, YlOrRd, YlGnBu) suit one-directional data; diverging schemes (RdYlGn, RdBu, Spectral) suit a midpoint. Any scheme works with any Scale type.

properties.name: reverseColors
properties.label: Colors · Reverse scheme
properties.description: Flip the color ramp so high values take the light end and low values the dark end (or vice-versa).

properties.name: colorMin
properties.label: Colors · Value domain minimum
properties.description: Fix the value that maps to the low end of the color scale. Blank = automatic (the data minimum).

properties.name: colorMax
properties.label: Colors · Value domain maximum
properties.description: Fix the value that maps to the high end of the color scale. Blank = automatic (the data maximum).

properties.name: divergingMidpoint
properties.label: Colors · Diverging midpoint
properties.description: Only for Diverging scale type: the value placed at the center of the color ramp. Blank = automatic (the mean of the data).

properties.name: quantizeSteps
properties.label: Colors · Quantize steps
properties.description: Only for Quantize scale type: the number of discrete color buckets the value range is split into.

properties.name: sortX
properties.label: X-axis · Column sort
properties.description: Order the columns: None (first-seen / explicit order), Ascending (by label), Descending (by label), or By value (by each column's total value, descending).

properties.name: xAxisLabel
properties.label: X-axis · Title
properties.description: Caption beneath the x-axis. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: xAxisPosition
properties.label: X-axis · Position
properties.description: Where to draw the column labels: along the Bottom or the Top of the grid.

properties.name: xTickRotation
properties.label: X-axis · Tick label rotation
properties.description: Rotate x-axis (column) tick labels by this many degrees (e.g. -45 or -90) so long or dense labels don't overlap. 0 = horizontal. The chart auto-reserves space for tilted labels.

properties.name: sortY
properties.label: Y-axis · Row sort
properties.description: Order the rows: None (first-seen / explicit order), Ascending (by label), Descending (by label), or By value (by each row's total value, descending).

properties.name: yAxisLabel
properties.label: Y-axis · Title
properties.description: Rotated caption beside the y-axis. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: axisColor
properties.label: Axes · Line color
properties.description: Color of the x and y axis lines and tick marks.

properties.name: axisTextColor
properties.label: Axes · Text color
properties.description: Text color for the x/y axis tick (category) labels and the axis titles.

properties.name: axisFontSize
properties.label: Axes · Font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the x/y axis category labels and the axis titles.

properties.name: axisFontFamily
properties.label: Axes · Font family
properties.description: CSS font-family for the x/y axis category labels and axis titles. Blank = use the base font family.

properties.name: showColorLegend
properties.label: Color legend · Show legend
properties.description: Show a gradient color legend mapping colors back to values.

properties.name: colorLegendPosition
properties.label: Color legend · Position
properties.description: Where to place the color legend: to the Right of the grid (vertical bar) or below it (horizontal bar).

properties.name: colorLegendTitle
properties.label: Color legend · Title
properties.description: Optional caption above/beside the color legend. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: colorLegendFormat
properties.label: Color legend · Tick format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for the color legend tick labels (e.g. ".0f", ",.0f", "$,.0f", ".0%"). Blank = default.

properties.name: showCellLabels
properties.label: Labels · Show cell values
properties.description: Draw the numeric value inside each cell.

properties.name: cellLabelFormat
properties.label: Labels · Value format
properties.description: D3 number format specifier for the in-cell value labels (e.g. ".0f", ",.0f", "$,.0f", ".1%", ".2s"). Blank = default.

properties.name: cellLabelFontSize
properties.label: Labels · Font size
properties.description: Font size (px) for the in-cell value labels.

properties.name: cellLabelColor
properties.label: Labels · Color
properties.description: Text color for the in-cell value labels. Blank = automatic black/white contrast chosen per cell against its fill color.

properties.name: cellLabelMinSize
properties.label: Labels · Hide below cell size (px)
properties.description: Hide in-cell value labels when a cell is smaller than this many pixels (avoids cramped, unreadable labels in dense grids). 0 = always show.

properties.name: showTooltip
properties.label: Tooltip · Show tooltip
properties.description: Show a hover tooltip over each cell.

properties.name: tooltipTemplate
properties.label: Tooltip · Template
properties.description: Tooltip content (light HTML allowed). Tokens: {x}, {y}, {value}, {formattedValue}, {rowIndex}, {colIndex}, {swatch} (a color dot matching the cell), {color}, and any custom key on the cell. Interpolated values are HTML-escaped.

properties.name: tooltipFollowCursor
properties.label: Tooltip · Follow cursor
properties.description: Tooltip follows the pointer. Turn off to anchor it near the hovered cell. Either way it's clamped within the chart bounds.

properties.name: tooltipBackground
properties.label: Tooltip · Background color
properties.description: Tooltip background (CSS color, supports rgba).

properties.name: tooltipTextColor
properties.label: Tooltip · Text color
properties.description: Tooltip text color.

properties.name: tooltipFontSize
properties.label: Tooltip · Font size
properties.description: Tooltip font size, in pixels.

actions.name: CHART_CLICKED
actions.label: Chart clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks anywhere on the chart (not on a specific cell).

payload.name: cellCount
payload.label: Number of cells
payload.description: How many populated cells are rendered.

payload.name: rowCount
payload.label: Number of rows
payload.description: How many Y categories (rows) are rendered.

payload.name: colCount
payload.label: Number of columns
payload.description: How many X categories (columns) are rendered.

actions.name: CELL_CLICKED
actions.label: Cell clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks an individual cell. Use to drill into details for that (x,y).

payload.name: x
payload.label: Column (x)
payload.description: The X category of the clicked cell.

payload.name: y
payload.label: Row (y)
payload.description: The Y category of the clicked cell.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: The numeric value of the cell.

actions.name: CELL_HOVERED
actions.label: Cell hovered
actions.description: Fired when the user hovers a cell. Useful for syncing external tooltips or details panels.

payload.name: x
payload.label: Column (x)
payload.description: The X category of the hovered cell.

payload.name: y
payload.label: Row (y)
payload.description: The Y category of the hovered cell.

payload.name: value
payload.label: Value
payload.description: The numeric value of the cell.
